'''lagada''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nyctograph|nyctograph]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''male''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-g-d
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nyctograph|nyctograph]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| male
|-
! Citation form
| lagada
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || lægædæth || lægædæj || lægædæsh || lægædæ
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || lagagadath || lagagadaj || lagagadash || lagagada
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || lagadath || lagadaj || lagadash || lagada
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || lagafdafth || lagafdafj || lagafdafsh || lagafdaf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for male singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || lagadatha || lagadaja || lagadasha || lagadaka
|-
| [[Patient]] || lagadath || lagadaj || lagadash || lagada
|-
| [[Possessive]] || lagadathal || lagadajal || lagadashal || lagadakal
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || lagadaathatha || lagadaajaja || lagadaashasha || lagadaaka
|-
| [[Dative]] || lagadathan || lagadajan || lagadashan || lagadakan
|-
| [[Speaker]] || lagadathaoro || lagadajaoro || lagadashaoro || lagadakaoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki male nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
